name: autogen
paperTitle: AutoGen: Toward Next-Generation Multi-Agent AI Applications
content:
## Introduction

Multiple specialized agents communicate via natural language, coordinating to solve problems no single agent could handle. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Multiple specialized agents communicate via natural language, coordinating to solve problems no single agent could handle.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
